back_translation: I commend to you Phoebe, our sister, who is also a servant of the church at Cenchreae
So that you may welcome her in the Lord in a manner worthy of the saints, and assist her in whatever matter she may need from you — for she has been a patroness of many, including of me myself
Greet Prisca and Aquila, my fellow workers in Christ Jesus
Both of them have risked their own lives for me — not only do I alone thank them, but all the churches of the Gentiles also
And greet the church that meets at their house. Greet Epaenetus, my beloved, who is the firstfruits of Asia for Christ
Greet Mary, who has worked very hard for you
Greet Andronicus and Junia, my kin and fellow prisoners — they are notable among the apostles, and they were in Christ before me
Greet Ampliatus, my beloved in the Lord
Greet Urbanus, our fellow worker in Christ, and Stachys my beloved
Greet Apelles, who is approved in Christ. Greet those of the household of Aristobulus
Greet Herodion, my kin. Greet those of the household of Narcissus who are in the Lord
Greet Tryphena and Tryphosa, women who work hard in the Lord. Greet Persis the beloved, who has worked very hard in the Lord
Greet Rufus, the chosen one in the Lord — and his mother, who is also my mother
Greet Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, Hermas, and the brothers who are with them
Greet Philologus and Julia, Nereus and his sister, and Olympas, and all the saints who are with them
Greet one another with a holy kiss. All the churches of Christ send greetings to you
Brothers, I urge you to watch out for those who cause divisions and stumbling-blocks contrary to the teaching you have learned — and turn aside from them
For such people do not serve our Lord Christ, but their own belly — and through pleasant-sounding speech and flattering words, they deceive the hearts of the innocent
For your obedience has spread to all — therefore I rejoice over you. But I want you to be wise about what is good, and innocent about what is evil
The God of peace will (royally) crush Satan under your feet quickly. May the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ abide with you
Timothy, my fellow worker, sends you greetings — along with Lucius, Jason, and Sosipater, my kin
I, Tertius, who wrote this letter, greet you in the Lord
Gaius, who hosts me and the whole church, sends you greetings. Erastus, the city treasurer, and Quartus the brother, also send you greetings
May the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ abide with all of you. Amen
